channel.title: Etsy on The Beige Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Etsy on The Beige Journal

item.title: In the Shop 🌿 Pregnancy Digital Sticker Set
item.description:
Are you expecting or planning? If you’re like me you’d want to journal and plan the whole process! This digital sticker set would be perfect for your digital pregnancy planner.

It has more than 100 stickers to help keep track of your pregnancy appointments and milestones!

See this set on Etsy! 🛒

item.title: How to plan using widgets
item.description:
Have you planned using widgets before?

What is a widget you might ask. A widget is a sticker that is used in your planner that helps you add a new section or tracker to your page.

To simply put it, it can be an additional sticker that you put to add a new section to your planner that isn’t already there. Most of the time, these are functional stickers.

I like using these widgets because I like the flexibility in my planning. Sometimes I can’t find a certain insert that fits all my needs on a daily or by weekly basis. Sometimes I need more sections and sometimes my days are just really boring and there’s nothing to note down.

item.title: Shop Update | Cottagecore sticker set + launch sale
item.description:
Winter makes me think of sweet summer days out in the sun. This month we’re day dreaming of those cottagecore aesthetics! This set has all the elements to create the perfect cozy spread with washis and paper elements for layering and cute hand drawn illustrations.

To celebrate this new set, enjoy 40% off now until Jan 26!

Check out the new set in our Etsy shop.

Want to see the sticker in action? Check out our plan with me below!

See this set on Etsy! 🛒

Watch this plan with me

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5w3A7aP8L-c

Pin it!

item.title: Plan with me | Emily in Paris sticker set + launch sale
item.description:
February is the month of love, and I always think of Paris as the city of love. What better way to combine this theme for the month!

This set is designed to give you a mix of the cute Paris vibe with a side of Emily in Paris social media magic.

To celebrate this new set, enjoy 40% off now until Feb 14th!

Check out the new set in our Etsy shop.

Want to see the sticker in action? Check out our plan with me below!

item.title: 2022 Digital Planner Roundup
item.description:
It’s that time of year again, when we think about all the lovely new planners that are going to help reach our yearly goals! We can’t wait to start planning out our life with all of these options. And it’s not just planners - in this roundup, you’ll find all of the best picks that will help you get organized and plan your future!

Take a look at this long list of curated planners for your planning needs!

item.title: The FREE digital planner library you didn't know about
item.description:
There are many benefits to using a digital planner. One of the biggest benefits is that you can reuse it over and over again, which saves you money in the long run. You can also customize your digital planner to fit your specific needs, which makes it more efficient and effective than a traditional paper planner. Plus, with a digital planner, you can easily access and update your schedule from anywhere, which is ideal for busy people on the go.

But when it comes to customizing your planner, there are tons of stickers or templates you’ll want to buy! If you’re always looking to freshen up your planner without the big price tag, here’s where you can find lots of FREE planning downloads!

item.title: New Release | Planner & Journaling Insert
item.description:
We have a new item in the shop and a bonus limited time discount code!

If you’re like me, you’ll like the flexibility of using an insert in your planner.

This insert has two features: Journaling, setting intensions for the day and planning out your daily tasks.

See the insert in action below!

New release discount!

Only valid until Nov 20, 2021

Use code NEWRELEASE20 for 20% off

See this set on Etsy! 🛒

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Fy5e12tVo7A&t=476s

item.title: How to start digital planning in 2024 | digital planner download
item.description:
https://youtu.be/_mSMu9z6EZc

The new year means setting new goals and plans. This year, if you’re just starting in the world of digital planning, it can get a bit confusing.

  • How do I choose my planner?

  • What apps should I use?

  • Where can I find planning resources?

Well, you’ve come to the right place, because this is a quick guide to get you started. AND a free planner for you to figure out if digital planning is for you at the end of this post! So let’s get started!

What is digital planning?

Digital planning in this case is using an iPad, tablet or computer to create a planner spread that can help your productivity. The most common way to digital plan is to use an iPad or tablet as a digital writing surface using a pen or stylus. You can read more about how to get started in digital planning in this blog post.

item.title: Shop Update | 2022 Mini Calendar Stickers
item.description:
Can you believe the new year is just around the corner?

Get these mini calendar stickers to organize your new year!

This set comes in PDF, and individually cropped PNGs, suitable for printable and digital planning

See this set on Etsy! 🛒

item.title: 🎃 All you need for the Halloween crafting: 3 million fonts & graphics for only $1 🎃

  • Halloween graphics

Only available from ​Sunday, 5 September until Sunday, 31 October, 2021!

item.title: Etsy Digital Planner Shop Black Friday Deals 2020
item.description:

For more planner sales, check our Current Sales section

Use BLACKMONERIAS for 20% off between November 27 and 30 

Shop Monerias Journals 

Black Friday sale with 30% off + people on the VIP email list will get a code for an additional 30% off! 

Join the email list

Shop Softedesigns

35% off from Black Friday to Monday with code BLACK.

Shop Jaeci Studio

Black Friday and a Cyber Monday sale

use BFF50, for 50% all items in the shop.

item.title: The Ultimate Digital Planner Shop list
item.description:
Tired of browsing Etsy for the perfect Digital Planner?

I understand how hard it is sometimes to weed through all the listings!
Here is a compiled list of Planner Shops that offer 2020 planners for your reference!

item.title: #StandWithSmall
item.description:
These days it feels like my days are blending together I’m losing motivation to do a lot of things. How about you?

One helpful way I find that keeps me motivated and helps set my days straight is to journal or plan. I have been listing my top three items I want to do daily so I can set some priorities for myself.  But, not all days need to feel productive and it’s also OK to not want to do anything.

Maybe it’s time to finally take that me time you’ve been putting away.  When I’m looking to unwind and practice my creativity, I’ll either write or doodle in my journals.  These days, I’ve been using digital journals and planners because I can bring them with me anywhere and they also save space.
